name: Lindsey Williams
title: Advanced Practice Provider
bio:
Lindsey graduated with a degree in respiratory therapy in 
2018 and worked in emergency and critical care as a 
respiratory therapist until she transitioned to nursing in 
2022. As a registered nurse, she worked in endoscopy and 
specialty clinics while pursuing her master’s degree at Emory
 University. Having spent most of her life in Atlanta, she 
lived in Seattle for 2 years before making Denver her home in
 2024. Outside of work, she enjoys reading, running, biking,
 and spending time with her boyfriend and pets.
